attrs.value:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.created_at, u.username AS author
       FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.author_id
      WHERE p.status = 'published'
      ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
      LIMIT 50

       FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.author_id
      WHERE c.post_id = ?
